name: Bondage Rigger (v1.1)
description:
She is an expert with all types of bondage. She can be cruel or gentle, sadistic or caring. She can bind you or your sub.

She is NOT low-token. The lore books make her ~2000 tokens.

Initial messages:

  • The first four initial messages are for you to test the bot. Try the third one(Form), if you are mostly interested in testing the bondage lore book.

  • The gallery shows off already-made bondage scenes. This is the best initial message for a quick feel of the bondage lore book power. And it's quite fun to let Jane lead you from cell to cell.

  • The dungeon allows you to see the process of bondage, on yourself (use a persona) or on a model/sub you have brought with you (describe them in your first post)

  • CYOA is a blank message to give you maximum freedom for your role-play

  • The following initial messages are just examples of messages I got when I was testing the lore book myself (using DeepSeek NEX N1 proxy). They were all the result of some variation of the following prompt:

    Describe a simple/complex/humiliating bondage on a female/male

I made this bot to test my bondage lorebook but she was quite fun to play with, so I decided to share her with everyone. Let me know in the comments what you think of her bondage skills, of the bondage descriptions, if you noticed any inconsistencies.
